pages.text: Deathberries... They earned their name for a reason. Consuming Deathberries is a death sentence not even the most mouse-brain would do. But if it happens... You might only have seconds until the poison honors its name.$(br)
pages.title: Deathberries
Deathberries
pages.text: A poison that has been consumed must be expelled. Yarrow, being the most disgusting of herbs, is specially helpful at making cats throw up. Consuming Yarrow Leaves will cause a cat to throw up the poison and save their live.$(br)
